_note: Per-account demo team — 5 REAL GitLab accounts in the sprint0-demo group (native assignees). A junior is added LIVE in the demo via CV onboarding (trust low → grows). uiux = the deliberate orphan gap (manager ratifies + staffing advisor). devops covered by the SSE. Trust spread on purpose: 2 high / 2 medium so passports don't all read 'maxed'. The SE is busy (load=100) on the senior_project.
